merged_events.event_description: Diplomatic relations and the American Legation at Monrovia were established when Commissioner and Consul General Abraham Hanson presented his credentials to the Liberian government.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations and the American Legation at Monrovia were established on February 23, 1864, when American Commissioner and Consul General Abraham Hanson presented his credentials to the Liberian government.

merged_events.event_description: The American Legation at Monrovia was elevated to Embassy status when Ambassador Edward R. Dudley presented his credentials to the Liberian government.

evidence.quote: The American Legation at Monrovia was elevated to Embassy status on May 6, 1949, when Ambassador Edward R. Dudley presented his credentials to the Liberian government.

merged_events.event_description: Abraham Hanson presented credentials as Commissioner and Consul General, establishing the first U.S. diplomatic presence in Liberia. The title 'Commissioner' indicates a liaison/diplomatic agent role rather than a full legation.

evidence.quote: Abraham Hanson, Commissioner and Consul General. Appointed: 1863-06-08. Credentials presented: 1864-02-23.

merged_events.event_description: John Seys presented credentials as Minister Resident/Consul General, elevating U.S. representation to a legation-level mission.

evidence.quote: John Seys, Minister Resident/Consul General. Appointed: 1866-10-08. Credentials presented: 1867-01-02.

matched.notes: Exact match on date (1864-02-23) and status (Legation). RDCR explicitly states the American Legation was established on this date. Event 2 (POCOM) covers the same date but misinterprets the 'Commissioner' title as Liaison; RDCR is primary and clearly says 'Legation.' Event 3 (POCOM, 1867-01-02) is a subsequent personnel event (new Minister Resident presenting credentials) at the already-established Legation, not a new institutional transition.
Exact match on date (1949-05-06) and status (Embassy). RDCR explicitly states the Legation was elevated to Embassy status on this date.
